market.coverage_policy: all 17 registered competition domains have explicit sport-key routes in global_evidence_routes_v475.json
market.historical_availability: from each competition-specific earliest supported timestamp, generally 2020 onward
market.snapshot_rule: use the closest provider snapshot equal to or earlier than the requested freeze; preserve provider snapshot timestamp and bookmaker last_update
market.handicap_normalization_rule: a provider spread is accepted as AH evidence only when it is a valid two-way football handicap surface with explicit line and both side prices; quarter-line values must never be fabricated
market.total_normalization_rule: OU evidence requires an explicit total line plus both over and under prices

secondary_routes.history: detailed historical exchange market data from April 2015
secondary_routes.caveat: exchange prices are not bookmaker quotes and must remain a separate economic source
market IDs, bookmaker identity and createdAt timestamps require field-level validation before formal normalization

secondary_routes.role: ongoing capture and near-term line movement
secondary_routes.caveat: documented historical pre-match odd values are retained for access up to 7 days after fixture start, so proactive capture is required and it is not the primary old-history backfill route
rows without original quote timestamps are not formal PIT synchronized market snapshots

lineup.confirmed_xi_pit_rule: confirmed XI may enter a historical freeze only when its observed/published timestamp is proven to be at or before that freeze; otherwise it is an observed label for training only

injury_suspension.api_football_history: injury endpoint data documented from April 2021
injury_suspension.pit_rule: source_observed_at_utc must be at or before the requested freeze; retrieval after the match without an original publication timestamp is retrospective reference only
injury_suspension.conflict_rule: preserve contradictory availability states and downgrade; never manually choose the convenient status

xg_events.research_open_route: StatsBomb Open Data where coverage exists
xg_events.formal_entry: competition-specific chronological OOF incremental improvement required

acquisition_gate.formal_market_complete_only_after: normalized 1X2/AH/OU snapshots with original timestamps pass multi-source validator and competition-specific LOMO/OOS gates
acquisition_gate.formal_lineup_injury_complete_only_after: PIT records with original timestamps and competition-specific coverage audits pass

competition_isolation: Every source-derived model artifact, calibrator and weight is learned and validated separately by competition_id.
